data.mode: How do you want to authenticate?

abort.no_installations: No installations were found for this account.
abort.unique_id_mismatch: This installation does not match the entry being re-authenticated.

set_battery_charge_power.name: Set battery charge power
set_battery_charge_power.description: Push a new charge/discharge setpoint to a FlowBuddy battery.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The battery charge power number entity.

watts.name: Watts
watts.description: Signed setpoint: positive charges, negative discharges.

limit_inverter.name: Limit inverter production
limit_inverter.description: Curtail a FlowBuddy inverter's production capacity.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The inverter production limit number entity.

comment.name: Comment
comment.description: Optional comment to attach before closing.

request_connection_test.name: Request connection test
request_connection_test.description: Ask FlowBuddy to test connectivity for a communicator.

enable_realtime.name: Enable live mode
enable_realtime.description: Boost live-value polling for a bounded window. Rate-limited by the vendor.

duration_minutes.name: Duration (minutes)
duration_minutes.description: How long to stay in live mode (max 5).

polling_limit_exceeded.title: Live polling blocked by FlowBuddy
polling_limit_exceeded.description: FlowBuddy blocked live polling for installation {installation_id} after too many requests. Retry in {retry_seconds} seconds.
